column1: C[NoBubblegum: gotta go. We'll finish this later
C[Quantumplation: I had this game in the bag, no idea what happened
NoBubblegum: lol I don't know. Seemed pretty even to me up until maybe 50 moves ago.

Quantumplation: Nah, it was definitely not going in your favor.  You'd lost the group at P11 until I blundered, and I had both top and sides.  Not being able to kill P11 meant my R13 and O16 groups weren't weak enough to kill your T15 group
C[NoBubblegum: wow. I really mess this up.
Quantumplation: lol a bit.  it got into really nasty fighting really early on
C[NoBubblegum: You should start a new game. I'm gonna resign this one.
C[NoBubblegum: How's life? What've you been up to?
C[NoBubblegum: How's life? What've you been up to?
C[Quantumplation: Work, so crazy busy lmao
C[NoBubblegum: lol Sleep is for the dead. Are you still coding for NYU?
C[Quantumplation: What about you, how have you been?
C[NoBubblegum: I'm good. I've only got one more month of work so I've been looking for something else and I've been participating in a variety of events, like improv games, dancing, and nerf battles.
C[NoBubblegum: It is. I'm find that I dislike the need for sleep and would much rather be coding or shooting people with foam darts. What kinds of things are you doing at work?
Quantumplation: right now I'm Rewriting the core system in charge of loading data from the database
Quantumplation: taking it slow, making sure I do it right
C[NoBubblegum: What are you writing it in?
C[NoBubblegum: Cool. I've got to run, but if you're free tomorrow we can keep playing then.
C[NoBubblegum: Cool. Talk to you later.
C[Quantumplation: Pretty great, so full. lol
C[NoBubblegum: Cool. Did you spend it with family?
C[Quantumplation: nope, old coworker in boston
C[NoBubblegum: have you see the bain freestyle video?
C[NoBubblegum: you should, it's pretty funny.
C[NoBubblegum: I'll talk to you later. I'm gonna go to sleep.
C[Quantumplation: LMAO oh fuck, I totally didn't realize you could make two eyes.
C[Quantumplation: This was my last move for tonight, i'm on my way out the door
Quantumplation: lol invite me to another one if you want
C[Shikad: Does B really want to play this more?
C[Cham3leoNinja: hey, hope you have fun
C[NoBubblegum: You should really stop playing inside area that I already surround. Try and take control of the empty space.
Cham3leoNinja: haha, you think I'm still playing
Cham3leoNinja: do you honestly believe anyone in their right mind would play inside that area?
Cham3leoNinja: at least anybody playing seriously?
Cham3leoNinja: i just wanted to see how many captures it was possible to lose
NoBubblegum: Not sure I see the point of that either.
GN[Lets see if I can remember this one now..]
NoBubblegum: Lol I'm sorry Pi, Go hasn't really been at the forefront of my mind lately and I kept putting it off.
NoBubblegum: How's life? Are you graduating this semester?
Quantumplation: nope, got 2 more years after this semester
C[NoBubblegum: How's life? Are you graduating this semester?
Quantumplation: nope, got 2 more years after this semester
C[NoBubblegum: Wow. You still working for NYU?
C[Quantumplation: yup, full time work and fulltime school haha
C[NoBubblegum: Lol Nice. Sounds exhausting. Do you still have your side projects going too, like the news aggregation site?
C[Quantumplation: no the news aggregation site fell apart almost a year ago
Quantumplation: but i do have side projects!
Quantumplation: and getting more and more into Go
C[NoBubblegum: Damn. That's twice I missed that moved. That sucks about the news site
NoBubblegum: You'll have to show me the game concepts sometime. I remember the ones that you told me about seemed really cool.
